body:
This is "THE ELEMENTALIST Rp " pack.

its is a texture pack of The Elementalist Datapack

first you should download the datapack then download this texture pack

to use this pack

Optifine required for texture pack.

this datapack has a texture pack.

there are two packs

Datapack     - The Elementalist Dp 

Texture pack - The Elementalist Rp

make sure you download both packs for the better and complete experience.

This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.17 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "THE ELEMENTALIST Pack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
